[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 0110001010 4
2 1110100100 5
3 1100101100 5
4 1000010111 5
5 0010110101 5
6 1001101110 6
7 1101100000 4

13 31 0010110101 5 match 5
